Our Story

Three Decades of
Authentic Flavour

"Every dip brings back a story."

Since 1989, Habib's Rojak has been serving authentic, award-winning Indian Rojak at the Ayer Rajah Hawker Centre in Singapore. For over three decades, our secret homemade gravy has been bringing back old stories and nostalgic memories with every single dip.

Every single item on our menu is freshly prepared daily in our kitchen to guarantee the true, premium taste that global food lovers crave. Voted Best Indian Rojak by both Class 95 and Class 96.8 listeners, our stall is a landmark of Singapore's beloved hawker culture.

🫙

The Signature Sauce

The heart of everything we do. Our homemade gravy is crafted from a treasured recipe perfected over 35 years — thick, aromatic, and impossibly complex. It's not just a sauce. It's a memory waiting to happen.

1989Founded
35+Years
2×Awards
1Secret Recipe
